node.html: Classes that help you test the relationships between your Akka actors in both unit and integration tests.
A class to randomly generate values. Useful for unit tests. Powered by AutoFixture. Can be configured per instance or globally.

A static Gatsby JS site.

The site's front-end is hosted using AWS Amplify static hosting, which is a wrapper around AWS CloudFront and AWS S3.

The contact forms are implemented using a number of AWS services. The browser accesses an AWS API Gateway via the AWS Amplify client SDK. The gateway invokes a Lambda function that places a message on an AWS SQS instance. Another Lambda function then polls the queue and uses AWS SES to send an email.

The code is hosted in AWS CodeCommit. Continious deployment is implemtented using AWS Amplify. The domain and DNS is managed via AWS Route 53.
